name: Thoropass
description: Thoropass — SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance automation platform with in-house auditing and continuous readiness monitoring.

seo.title: Thoropass — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Thoropass: Thoropass — SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance automation platform with in-house auditing and continuous readiness monitoring.

when_to_use: SOC 2 continuous monitoring with in-house auditor access
ISO 27001 evidence collection with automated integrations
HIPAA compliance readiness platform for health tech startups
Audit management workflow with real-time readiness scoring
PCI DSS compliance automation for payment processing companies

pros: In-house auditors remove the find-an-auditor problem
Multi-framework scope including HIPAA and PCI
Smooth handoff from readiness to actual audit
cons: Bundling audit and software can feel like lock-in
Pricing pitched above Vanta for comparable scope
Less flexible if you already have an audit firm
Integrations still catching up with top competitors
review.verdict: The one-stop option for teams that hate coordinating auditors — the premium is real, and so is the convenience.
review.best_for: Teams wanting a single vendor to cover readiness plus audit delivery
review.not_for: Companies with an existing auditor relationship they want to keep

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
